pages.text: A shard of the deep, hung in the sky. Mossy deepslate and tuff, with dripstone teeth on its underside. Craft it from deepslate dug out of a low-thrown Rocky island.
$(bold)Riches$()$(br)Every deepslate ore lives here, down to diamond and emerald, plus $(item)amethyst$() geodes and $(item)dripstone$().
$(bold)Looks$()$(br)Deep cave (mossy, dripstone), geode (calcite), and a rare deep-dark variant with $(item)sculk$() — sensors, a catalyst, even a shrieker. And the moss to unlock the Lush island.
